title: arXiv Trend Agent
short_desc: LangGraph-based Multi-Agent service for automated arXiv paper collection, Korean summarization, trend analysis, and RAG Q&A.

title: Real-time Point Cloud Segmentation System
short_desc: Real-time 3D LiDAR semantic segmentation with adaptive ground estimation and selective neural network inference.

title: BEVSA: BEV Segmentation Accelerator
short_desc: 28nm ASIC accelerator for real-time bird's-eye-view semantic segmentation in multi-camera autonomous driving systems.

title: Muscle SYNC
short_desc: AI-based sensorless muscle activation analysis using computer vision.

title: LSPU: Real-Time LiDAR-SLAM SoC
short_desc: Demo system for a fully integrated real-time LiDAR-SLAM SoC with point neural network segmentation, presented at ISSCC 2024.
